results.name: ruby_array_dedupe_sort
results.code:
require 'csv'
filename = ARGV[0]
CSV.open(filename, "r") do |csv|
  csv.each do |row|
    numbers = row.split(',').map(&:to_i)
    unique_numbers = numbers.uniq.sort.reverse.join(',')
    puts unique_numbers
  end
end

results.name: ruby_hash_group
results.code:
require 'set'

def group_words_by_first_letter(filename)
  words = {}
  
  File.open(filename).each do |line|
    word = line.strip.downcase
    first_letter = word[0].downcase
    
    if words[first_letter]
      words[first_letter] += ",#{word}"
    else
      words[first_letter] = "#{word}"
    end
  end
  
  sorted_words = Set.new(words.keys.sort)
  
  sorted_words.each do |letter|
    puts "#{letter}: #{words[letter]}"
  end
end

group_words_by_first_letter(ARGV[0])
results.exec_output:
a: apple,avocado
b: banana,blueberry
c: cherry

results.name: ruby_class_stack
results.code:
class Stack
  def initialize
    @stack = []
  end

  def push(item)
    @stack.push(item)
  end

  def pop
    return nil if @stack.empty?
    item = @stack.pop()
    item
  end

  def peek
    return nil if @stack.empty?
    top_item = @stack.last
    top_item
  end
end

stack_instance = Stack.new
stack_instance.push(1)
stack_instance.push(2)
stack_instance.push(3)

puts stack_instance.peek # Output: 3
puts stack_instance.pop   # Output: 3
puts stack_instance.peek # Output: 2
